# Copilot Project Preferences

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Pure HTML5, Vanilla JavaScript (ES6+), and plain CSS.
- No frameworks (no React, Vue, etc.) unless explicitly requested.

## Coding Style
- Use clear, descriptive variable names in camelCase.
- Keep functions small and focused on a single task.
- Include comments for complex logic blocks.

## Workflow Preferences
- When writing CSS, use modern Flexbox or Grid layout.

## Copilot Features
- Enable GPT-5 mini for all clients
